Motion To Compel Discovery Responses
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANTS NIKKI RUELES and AOUDA MORAZAN'S Motion To Compel Discovery Responses is GRANTED. The motion to compel verifications to previously provided discovery responses, and clear copies of those responses, and for monetary sanctions, is unopposed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve signed and dated verifications to his written responses to defendants' form interrogatories (set one), special interrogatories (set one) and document requests (set one) within 10 days from the date of service of this order. Within the same time period, plaintiff shall serve on defendants clear copies of those written responses and of the photographs provided in response to the document requests. Sanctions are awarded against plaintiff in the amount of $360.00. The prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim.

Judge Pro Tem: David Helbraun; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Not Reported. (D302/jpt)
